key_events_next_24h.name: FOMC Rate Decision (Hold Expected at 3.50-3.75%)
key_events_next_24h.note: Rate hold near-certain (CME FedWatch ~100%). No cuts priced for all of 2026. Decision itself is not a shock — Powell press conference tone is the real catalyst.

key_events_next_24h.name: Fed Chair Powell Press Conference
key_events_next_24h.note: Forward guidance on inflation outlook is key. Hormuz/oil pressure keeps hawkish tone risk elevated. Hawkish remarks could push BTC below $76K support.

key_events_next_24h.name: US GDP Q1 2026 Advance Estimate (BEA)
key_events_next_24h.note: Atlanta Fed GDPNow nowcast: ~1.2% vs consensus 2.5-3.0%. Weak print = stagflation signal = bearish for risk assets.

key_events_next_24h.name: Spot BTC ETF Daily Flow Report
key_events_next_24h.note: Apr 28 outflow: $89.7M (following $263.2M outflow on Apr 27). Two consecutive outflow days breaks recent positive streak. Watch for continuation or reversal.

key_events_next_24h.name: US-Iran / Hormuz Watch (Ongoing)
key_events_next_24h.note: Hormuz restrictions ongoing, Brent >$104/barrel. No resolution imminent. Sustained oil pressure keeps inflation concerns elevated.

key_events_next_24h.name: SEC comment period: crypto ETF listing rule (NYSE Arca 85-item proposal)

notes: FOMC 오늘 18시, ETF 이틀 연속 순유출, $80K 저항 실패 지속

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$77,161 as of Apr 29 ~09:30 ET (14:30 UTC). Up ~1% from yesterday but still repeatedly rejected at $80K. Support ~$75,000 (100-day MA area). Volume declining since Feb highs — low-volume recovery is fragile.
sentiment_key_signals: BTC twice rejected at $80K resistance — technical ceiling intact
Spot BTC ETF outflows: $89.7M Apr 28 + $263.2M Apr 27 — two consecutive days bearish
Fear & Greed Index: 47 (Neutral) — fragile sentiment ahead of FOMC
BTC dominance >60% — altcoins underperform; flight-to-quality within crypto
Trading volume declining sharply since Feb highs (Glassnode: low depth, high sensitivity to flows)
Brent crude >$104/barrel (Hormuz restrictions) — inflation pressure sustained
FOMC Apr 29: decision at 18:00 UTC, Powell press conference 18:30 UTC — key macro catalyst today
GDP Q1 2026 advance estimate Apr 30 12:30 UTC — Atlanta Fed nowcast ~1.2% (well below 2.5-3% consensus)
SEC regulatory shift to collaboration (positive long-term, no immediate catalyst)
Bitcoin 2026 Conference ongoing — Lightning Network infra upgrades (mild positive)
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC decision at 18:00 UTC today (Apr 29). Rate hold near-certain but Powell press conference (18:30 UTC) is key risk. Oil >$104 reduces likelihood of dovish tone. GDP Q1 advance estimate (Apr 30) expected weak — stagflation signal bearish for risk assets. ETF outflows turning negative for two consecutive days and $80K double rejection reinforce bearish short-term bias. Today's +1% intraday bounce is low-volume and fragile.
analysis.regime_rationale: Bearish (0.58): BTC failed $80K twice, ETF outflows two consecutive days ($263M + $89.7M), declining volume, Hormuz/oil headwinds, FOMC pre-event uncertainty, weak GDP nowcast. Confidence slightly reduced from 0.62 to 0.58 due to today's +1% bounce and SEC pro-crypto stance. Macro filter ACTIVE (>=0.5). Prefer SHORT bias or cautious HOLD. Reassess after FOMC press conference (18:30 UTC).
